title: smilax australis
intro: Smilax australis, also known as the Australian greenwood or blackberry lily, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its berries and roots, which have been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of smilax australis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Smilax australis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
